nowadays,dataselectionhasbecomeastandardstepinthe
pre-training stage. This step has played a critical role in
enhancingdataqualityandoptimizingtrainingefficiency
duringthedevelopmentofvariousLLMs(Touvronetal.,
2023b;DeepSeek-AI,2024). Whilepreviouspracticesof-
tenrelyonhumanheuristicssuchaspre-definedrulesand

etal.,2024a),inthisworkweaimtodirectlyidentifydata
thatcouldcontributeeffectivelytolearningvariousabilities.
Weareinspiredbythebeliefthat“compressionrepresents
intelligence” and the corresponding empirical finding re-
cently(Huangetal.,2024),thatthecompressionefficiency
(i.e., the normalized loss)1 of a series of models on cer-
tain raw text, strongly correlates with their downstream
benchmarkperformance,whenthetextdataalignswiththe
benchmark domains. For example, Huang et al. (2024)
